title: Introduction to Abstract Data Types (ADT)
summary: 9618 AS — stacks, queues, linked lists, and ADT operations vs implementation.
learningObjectives: Define abstract data type and its operations.
Describe stack, queue, and linked list ADTs.

simpleExplanation.title: What not how
simpleExplanation.summary: An ADT defines operations (push, pop) without specifying implementation. Stacks are LIFO; queues are FIFO.
steps: Linked list: dynamic nodes with pointers.
Array implementation — fixed size but fast index access.

sections.content: **ADTs** (10.4) are tested with **diagrams** and **pseudocode**. Draw **pointer changes** for linked list insert/delete.
